title: Go System Valve Gas Cartridge Camping Gas Stove Cartridge Burner Iso-Butane/Propane 227 g, 4
features: High quality 227g bayonet cartridge. Reliable ISO butane/propane mix. Can be used at low temperatures and high altitudes down to -20°C.
With safety valve and self-sealing. CRV valve: in the event of a pressure build-up, gas is slowly released.
Can be used as a screw cartridge using the adapter. Ideal for camping, the garden or trekking.
Dimensions: Diameter 6.8 x 18.5 cm, 390 g. Weight (1 piece full): approx. 330 g. Filling weight: 227 g.
description: These gas cartridges from Go System are ideal for mobile use due to their low weight. The CRV valve offers special safety: this automatically releases gas in the event of pressure build-up. Whether camping, hiking, fishing or trekking tours: the cartridges are ideal for cooking, grilling or for operating gas lamps. You can also easily convert the valve cartridges into screw cartridges with an adapter. You can then operate lamps and gas cookers with an EN417 connection with these cartridges.
